text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thanks for letting me take time off. I
spoiled myself a bit.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And what did I do? ...I ignored my alarm three
times!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I spent the entire day... in pajamas! How
bourgeois!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And all that sleep made my skin look better too...
Feels that way, at least!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, you can look forward to a new and
improved Nature! Hehe, just kidding! ♪
